_readme: UltimateEdge School — Curriculum Data. To add a lesson: find the subject, add a new object to the topics array inside the right section. The classroom.html player loads this file automatically.

mathematics.label: Mathematics Syllabus
mathematics.desc: Master Algebra, Calculus, and Geometry with shortcut formulas used by top students.

topics.name: Number Bases & Quadratic Equations
topics.notes: This lesson covers the foundational algebraic concepts tested in JAMB and WAEC. Pay attention to the factorization method and the quadratic formula — these appear in almost every past paper.
keyPoints: Factorization method: express as (ax + b)(cx + d) = 0
Sum of roots = −b/a · Product of roots = c/a
Number base conversions: always divide by target base repeatedly
topics.formula: x = (−b ± √(b²−4ac)) / 2a  |  where a, b, c are coefficients

topics.name: Indices, Surds & Logarithms
topics.notes: Master the laws of indices and surds. These come up in at least 3 questions in every JAMB paper.
keyPoints: Law of indices: aᵐ × aⁿ = aᵐ⁺ⁿ
Log rule: log(ab) = log a + log b
topics.formula: log_a(x) = log(x)/log(a)  |  Change of base formula

topics.name: Trigonometry & Angles
topics.notes: SOHCAHTOA and the unit circle. Trig identities appear heavily in JAMB.
topics.formula: sin²θ + cos²θ = 1  |  tan θ = sin θ / cos θ

topics.name: Circle Theorems & Mensuration
topics.notes: Circle theorems are high-yield in WAEC. Learn the 7 main theorems.
keyPoints: Angles in same segment are equal

topics.name: Differentiation
topics.notes: Power rule, chain rule, and product rule. Calculus questions are almost guaranteed in JAMB.

topics.name: Integration
topics.notes: Integration as the reverse of differentiation. Areas under curves.
keyPoints: Definite integrals give area under curve

topics.name: Statistics: Mean, Median, Mode
topics.notes: Data representation and measures of central tendency. Always comes up in WAEC.
keyPoints: Mean = sum of values ÷ number of values

topics.name: Probability
topics.notes: Basic probability, addition and multiplication rules.
keyPoints: P(A or B) = P(A) + P(B) − P(A and B)
P(A and B) = P(A) × P(B) for independent events
topics.formula: P(A) = n(A) / n(S)  |  where S = sample space

physics.label: Physics Syllabus
physics.desc: Learn the principles behind the math so you can solve any Physics problem.

topics.name: Scalars, Vectors & Motion
topics.notes: Understanding the difference between scalars and vectors is fundamental to all physics problems.
keyPoints: Equations of motion: v=u+at, s=ut+½at², v²=u²+2as
Resultant vector by Pythagoras for perpendicular vectors
topics.formula: v = u + at  |  s = ut + ½at²  |  v² = u² + 2as

topics.name: Newton's Laws & Forces
topics.notes: Newton's laws underpin all mechanics. Know all three laws with examples.
keyPoints: 1st Law: object stays at rest/motion unless force acts
3rd Law: action and reaction are equal and opposite

topics.name: Wave Properties & Sound
topics.notes: Transverse vs longitudinal waves. Speed, frequency, wavelength relationship.
keyPoints: Transverse waves: oscillation ⊥ direction of travel
Longitudinal waves: oscillation ∥ direction of travel

topics.name: Current, Voltage & Ohm's Law
topics.notes: Ohm's Law and circuit fundamentals. High yield in both JAMB and WAEC.
topics.formula: V = IR  |  P = IV  |  P = I²R

english.label: English Language Syllabus
english.desc: Practice Lexis, Oral English, and Comprehension patterns that JAMB and WAEC love.

topics.name: Lexis, Register & Word Classes
topics.notes: Understanding register, word classes and their functions in sentences.
keyPoints: Noun: names a person, place, thing or idea
topics.formula: Subject + Verb + Object  |  Basic Sentence Structure

topics.name: Comprehension & Summary
topics.notes: WAEC comprehension technique: read question before passage.
keyPoints: Find answers in order (they usually follow passage order)
topics.formula: Points × Marks per Point = Total Score

topics.name: Vowels, Consonants & Stress
topics.notes: JAMB Oral English tests phonetics. Learn vowel sounds and word stress patterns.
keyPoints: Stress falls on different syllables changing meaning
Question words often have rising intonation
Minimal pairs: words differing in one sound

chemistry.label: Chemistry Syllabus
chemistry.desc: Organic Chemistry made easy. Learn reactions through constant practice with SSCE questions.

topics.name: Atomic Structure & Periodic Table
topics.notes: The periodic table trends are heavily tested. Know groups and periods and their properties.
keyPoints: Isotopes: same proton number, different neutron number
Periodic trends: electronegativity increases across period
topics.formula: Mass Number = Protons + Neutrons  |  Atomic Number = Protons

topics.name: Chemical Bonding
topics.notes: Ionic, covalent and metallic bonding. WAEC questions often ask bond type and properties.
keyPoints: Metallic: positive ions in sea of electrons
topics.formula: NaCl: Na⁺ + Cl⁻ = ionic bond  |  H₂O: shared electrons = covalent

topics.name: Hydrocarbons: Alkanes & Alkenes
topics.notes: Organic chemistry naming and reactions. Alkanes (CₙH₂ₙ₊₂) vs Alkenes (CₙH₂ₙ).
keyPoints: Bromine water test: alkene decolourizes it
IUPAC naming: count longest carbon chain
topics.formula: Alkane: CₙH₂ₙ₊₂  |  Alkene: CₙH₂ₙ  |  Alkyne: CₙH₂ₙ₋₂
